title: Origins: Genshin
description: An Origins addon that adds Genshin-styled power rendering and Elemental Combat to the Origins mod.
body:
Origins: Genshin is an Origin addon that brings Genshin-styled skill rendering and Elemental Combat to your Origin powers.

## Getting Started Origins: Genshin is built on top of the Origins mod, which means that adding an icon and using the elements is as easy as creating a power! Wanna get started? You can visit the documentation here: [https://origins-genshin.readthedocs.io/en/latest/](https://origins-genshin.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) Looking for a standalone version without the need for Origins? Check out [Seven Elements](https://modrinth.com/mod/seven-elements)!
